title: CLUTTERERS ANONYMOUS - 211info
text: CLUTTERERS ANONYMOUS CLUTTERERS ANONYMOUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an international, nonprofessional, self-supporting 12-Step fellowship where members share experience, strength, and hope to address clutter-related challenges. Use the locator tool on the website to find local meetings. Confidential Address Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Meeting times vary by location. Daily telephone meetings and peer support calls are available. Email (866) 402-6685 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Message phone (866) 402-6685 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for local meeting times. For questions, call and leave a message. A volunteer will return the call. FEES: Donation requested DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Hoarding Support Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLUTTERERS ANONYMOUS
